summary: Near‑perfect show with warm, crystal‑clear FOB recording; standout Jerry vocal on “Peggy‑O” and gorgeous harpsichord textures.
review: Fans rave that this front‑of‑house (FOB) capture sounds like it was recorded last night – warm, beautiful and exceptionally clear, even letting Jerry’s growls and the harpsichord‑like keyboard tone shine through. The performance is described as near flawless, highlighted by a heartfelt rendition of “Peggy‑O” and overall superb musicianship.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give five stars and praise both the musical performance and the recording quality; no negatives are mentioned, indicating an outstanding show with excellent FOB sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm, clear, near‑studio fidelity; vocals and instruments (especially keyboards) are well defined, no reported dropouts or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing, but reviewers describe the entire concert as a cohesive, family‑friendly experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal growls and heartfelt rendition of “Peggy‑O” are highlighted; listeners can even hear his nuances clearly.
band_member_comments.Keys: Harpsichord‑like effect on the keyboards is praised as a beautiful texture.
